runTitle: Production targeted QA - v8.11.24 post-deploy smoke and guest-login probe
coveredSurfaces: production login page render on v8.11.24
production guest CTA visibility on login page

usageChecks.summary: Local Vercel CLI usage query failed during post-deploy QA; manual dashboard confirmation is required.

artifacts.label: Production login page after guest CTA no-op probe

notes: Vercel production deployment dpl_3cutqnX7vMtm5qAuxzgnAnVULEmk for chore(release): 8.11.24 was READY and promoted before QA started.
Post-deploy smoke passed on attempt 1/9 for /, /validation, and /api/version with expected version 8.11.24.

Headless browser probe rendered the production login page and exposed the guest CTA, but clicking the CTA did not emit any /api or /auth requests and the page remained on /login?redirectTo=%2Fdashboard.
Because guest login did not establish a session in the probe, /dashboard?serverId=web-nginx-dc1-01 redirected back to login and the dashboard autofocus modal could not be verified in production.
This run should be treated as deployment smoke plus interaction probe, not as complete release-surface signoff for the guest-login/dashboard flow.
